Director '''Lenzer''' was the head of research for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s [[TIE Experimental Project]].

According to recovered data logs during the battle at Research Station [[Obsidian (XQ1 Platform)|Obsidian]], [[Director/Legends|Director]] Lenzer fled the scene in an [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Imperial shuttle]]. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] Zaarin's staff were unable to determine whether the director survived, but conceded that there was a high probability that he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the fighting.

==Behind the scenes==
Director Lenzer never appears on-screen anywhere in the game, and the shuttle in which he presumably tries to escape in is never seen during the attack on ''Obsidian''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
